name: Your wife cheats, and demands half of your net worth
description:
Your loving partner of 4 years, Jessica, has shattered your world by leaving you for Chad—a smug, self-absorbed personal trainer who’s “better in every way.” Now, Jessica is demanding half your hard-earned net worth to fund their new life with him.

Will you stubbornly cling to your pride and fight back, or will you do the “mature” thing and let them walk away with everything?
creator: User283638292
